name: EWK Inc.
summary: EWK Inc. engages in the manufacture and sale of equipment for refineries and power plants in South Korea. It offers heat exchangers and reactors, pressure vessels, air cooler condensers, waste heat oil heaters, gathering systems, piping spools, strainers and filters, columns and towers, suction pots, motor and pump housings, head plates, foot values, lube oil package and metering systems, and offshore heat exchangers. The company was founded in 2009 and is headquartered in Busan, South Korea.
